betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Burner Press§f

§aUse fuel and stamps to press raw metal into usable shapes and components.§f

The §bBurner Press§f is one of the first machines you will build. It uses solid fuel (coal, charcoal, lignite) to drive a stamp that presses metal ingots into plates, wires, and other shapes.

§6Crafting§f:
Made from iron, a furnace, and a piston at a crafting table.

§6Operation§f:
Insert a §bstamp§f in the top slot and a metal ingot in the bottom slot. The press heats up over time — process in batches for efficiency.

§eTip§f: Build a §bBurner Press Preheater§f underneath to reduce warm-up time. Later, upgrade to the §bElectric Press§f for faster, consistent operation without fuel.
